items.title: JPMorgan and Goldman Upgrade MP Materials Amid Defense-Driven Demand Outlook
items.description: MP Materials stock looks poised for a rebound as analysts see major upside and strategic importance in U.S. defense and rare-earth supply chains.

items.title: Oil Futures Snap Three-Session Losing Streak
items.description: 1542 ET – Crude futures rise for the first time in four sessions, supported by a rally in equities, while reports of progress in renewed U.S. efforts toward a Russia-Ukraine peace deal keep the war-risk premium subdued.  The U.S. bank estimates the oil market will need around 2 million barrels per day in cuts starting from June 2026 to stabilize.

items.title: Why Circle Stock Is Falling—and Why Some Analysts See Big Upside
items.description: Circle Internet has grown revenue and its USDC stablecoin business considerably, but threats to its margins and concerns about interest rates divide analysts.

items.title: Russia-Ukraine Peace Efforts Keep Crude in the Red
items.description: Oil futures are lower with the market focusing on U.S. efforts to bring about peace talks between Russia and Ukraine.

items.title: Strategic Buyouts & Diverse Revenues Aid Raymond James Amid Cost Woes
items.description: RJF leans on strategic acquisitions and strong PCG revenues to drive growth even as capital markets dependence and rising expenses weigh.
